manufacturing_process: Stamped rail reinforcement welded into front rail assembly
primary_function: Support front crash load path and front structure durability
interfaces: Front rail, shotgun, bumper beam bracket, dash crossmember, underbody node
load_cases: Frontal impact, offset impact, towing load, road durability, body torsion
environmental_exposure: Front underbody corrosion exposure and stone impact
known_design_concerns: Crash load path, fatigue, spot weld quality, dimensional variation, corrosion, forming split
assumptions: Synthetic demo data only. Final values require engineering review.
